introSection: Suspended Looping Coaster is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Suzhou Amusement Land in Huqiu, Suzhou, Jiangsu, China. It is the second of two "787m Extended" SLCs produced by Vekoma, the other being Vortex at Siam Park City.
fullText: Suspended Looping Coaster is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Suzhou Amusement Land in Huqiu, Suzhou, Jiangsu, China. It is the second of two "787m Extended" SLCs produced by Vekoma, the other being Vortex at Siam Park City.
